title: School of Education | Galgotias University
content: Funded Projects Publication WOS/Scopus Student Publication Patent Published/Granted Teaching has long been recognised as a noble profession across the world, wherein teachers are regarded as transmitters of knowledge, sources of inspiration, and guides in humanity’s enduring pursuit of learning. Historically, educators have enjoyed a position of high esteem in society, largely due to the dedication and selfless service demonstrated by teachers in ancient times who devoted, often sacrificing their lives to the cause of education. In earlier periods, entry into the teaching profession was largely restricted to individuals who possessed inherent qualities considered essential for effective teaching. However, with the expansion of formal schooling and the increasing demand for qualified educators, organised systems of teacher preparation gradually evolved. These structured teacher education programmes were designed to equip prospective teachers with essential pedagogical knowledge, instructional skills, and professional competencies. Over time, the field of teacher education has broadened considerably in its scope and dimensions. Its central objective has remained the preparation of competent, reflective, and committed teachers capable of responding effectively to the changing needs of learners and society. In alignment with this vision, the School of Education at Galgotias University offers full-time, on-campus programmes at the integrated, undergraduate, and postgraduate levels in the field of education. These include the four-year Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) with a major–dual-degree structure, the Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.), and the Master of Education (M.Ed.). These programmes are implemented in collaboration with various schools and departments of the University, such as the Schools of Liberal Education, Basic Sciences, Biosciences and Technology, Commerce, Engineering and Technology, Nursing, Media and Mass Communication, and Lifelong Learning, in accordance with the interdisciplinary framework envisioned in the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020. In addition, the University offers a Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) programme in Education to foster advanced research, academic inquiry, and scholarly development in the field of education. The School of Education (SOE) at Galgotias University was established in 2014 with the objective of promoting excellence in teacher education, professional training, and educational research. The school commenced its academic activities with the introduction of a one-year Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) programme in the academic session 2014–2015, with due recognition from the National Council for Teacher Education (NCTE). Subsequently, in accordance with the NCTE Regulations, 2014, the duration of all teacher education programmes in India was revised from one year to two years. In compliance with these regulatory guidelines, Galgotias University restructured its B.Ed. programme into a two-year course from the academic session 2015–2016. Further strengthening its academic offerings, the School of Education introduced the NCTE recognised Master of Education (M.Ed.) programme from the academic session 2019–2020. In its continued commitment to advancing educational scholarship and research, the school has also been offering the Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) programme in Education since 2020. From the academic session 2026–27, the University is offering integrated four-year dual-major bachelor’s degree programmes under the Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP), wherein one major is in Education and the other in a disciplinary or interdisciplinary field of knowledge. These programmes include B.Sc. B.Ed. (Secondary), B.A. B.Ed. (Secondary), and B.A. B.Ed. (Middle). As per NEP-2020, starting in 2030, this 4-year B.Ed. will be the minimum qualification for all school teachers. In addition to these integrated programmes, the University continues to offer the Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) and Master of Education (M.Ed.) programmes. The ITEP, B.Ed., and M.Ed. programmes are duly recognised by the Northern Regional Committee of the National Council for Teacher Education (NRC–NCTE) under the NCTE Regulations, 2014. The four-year Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) aims to develop passionate, motivated, and professionally competent teachers who are well equipped to design and implement developmentally appropriate learning experiences across various stages of school education. The programme emphasises excellence in disciplinary knowledge, pedagogy, professional values, and reflective practice, thereby ensuring the holistic preparation of prospective teachers. The B.Ed. programme is a pre-service professional teacher education programme designed to prepare teachers for the secondary and senior secondary stages of schooling. The M.Ed. and Ph.D. programmes are intended to cultivate teacher educators, researchers, and educational professionals capable of contributing meaningfully to teaching, research, policy, and leadership across diverse educational contexts. The programmes offered by the School of Education are rigorous, comprehensive, and closely aligned with the practical demands of professional teaching. The school is equipped with modern classrooms, seminar halls, specialised resource centres, and a well-stocked library, in addition to access to the wider academic infrastructure of Galgotias University. A wide range of curricular and co-curricular activities is regularly organised by both the School and the University to promote the holistic development of students. A mentor-mentee (tutor–ward) system is also in place, enabling faculty members to provide personalised academic guidance and pastoral support in addressing the diverse learning needs of students. Extensive pre-practice teaching components, including preparatory teaching, microteaching, integrated lessons, and simulated teaching, along with demonstration lessons, practice teaching, and school internships, constitute integral elements of all programmes. These structured experiences enable student-teachers to develop strong pedagogical competencies and a deeper understanding of effective teaching methodologies. Equal emphasis is placed on academic excellence as well as participation in sports, cultural, and recreational activities, alongside a conscious effort to inculcate ethical values and social responsibility among future educators. The school regularly updates its curriculum in accordance with the recommendations of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020. In this regard, several contemporary and skill-oriented courses have been introduced in the B.Ed. programme, including Artificial Intelligence, Coding and Python, Ethics and Professional Competency, Creativity, Innovation and Entrepreneurship with Intellectual Property Rights (IPR), Aptitude Building and Logical Reasoning, and a Field-Based Research Project. All programmes are structured under the semester system to align with emerging societal needs and global academic trends, thereby enabling student-teachers to develop qualitative competencies, global perspectives, and practical skills essential for effective engagement in school environments and professional work cultures. The syllabi of the ITEP, B.Ed., and M.Ed. programmes have been developed in accordance with the guidelines of the National Council for Teacher Education (NCTE), the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT), and the University Grants Commission–Choice Based Credit System (UGC–CBCS). The curricula of the teacher education programmes are also benchmarked against those of leading universities in the country to ensure academic quality and relevance. The School of Education provides state-of-the-art infrastructure and diverse learning resources that create a conducive environment for the professional development of prospective teachers. A variety of learning experiences, addressing physical, intellectual, and reflective dimensions of teacher preparation, are regularly organised through both theoretical engagement and practical exposure. A detailed academic calendar is prepared each semester to ensure the systematic and effective implementation of all programmes. Furthermore, students undertake their school internships in reputed schools and educational institutions across the Delhi–NCR region, providing them with valuable hands-on experience in real classroom settings. The School of Education (SOE) also actively supports students in their professional placement and career advancement. Notably, several B.Ed. students secure teaching positions in highly reputed schools even before the completion of their programme. In addition, many graduates have successfully entered government teaching services, including positions in Kendriya Vidyalayas, the Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Department, Directorate of Education, Delhi, and the Government of Bihar. Students enrolled in the M.Ed. and Ph.D. programmes contribute significantly to the advancement of educational research. They regularly present research papers at national and international conferences and publish scholarly work in the form of research articles and book chapters, thereby enriching academic discourse in the field of education. The School of Education remains firmly committed to excellence in the preparation of teachers, teacher educators, educational professionals, and researchers. Recognising that the quality of education is closely linked to the quality of teachers, the school emphasises the holistic development of knowledge, professional skills, attitudes, ethical values, and experiential learning during the process of teacher preparation. As teachers play a crucial role in nation-building, the School of Education continues to strive to provide innovative, inclusive, and high-quality learning opportunities that empower its students to contribute meaningfully to society. At this place, I found educators who are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable, and who have always guided and motivated me throughout my courses. Before joining the course, I had my own institute, and being an institute teacher, I never realised that there could also be effective methods of teaching, and this changed my thoughts of teaching. Here, I also learned inclusive teaching methods, which helped me teach effectively and gave me the opportunity to identify the methods of teaching to all types of students. This course has helped me shape my future as a progressive teacher. Ayushi Sikarwar 2018-20I am Ayushi Sikarwar, alumni of B.Ed department, I have done Bachelor of Education from Galgotias University. Let me share my experience with you all. So initially I was very introvert person and unable to express my opinion and matter in crisp and precise manner to anyone. This degree helped me a lot to enhance my skills in various aspects like physical, emotional, social etc. In this degree we learned a lot about how to express our opinions properly and how to communicate so that we become a teacher who can willing to change the scenarios of today’s education system. We conducted lots of activities under the guidance of our teachers. Faculty of SCHOOL OF EDUCATION is actually very supportive and always kept us motivated during our journey. Faculty is very helpful. I felt drastic change in my personality because of this degree. Faculty will going to provide you a platform where you got chance to come up on stage and enhance your skills. For me , School of Education has contributed well in my personality development. Therefore I feel , the one who actually want to be a good in education field must choose SCHOOL OF EDUCATION from Galgotias University. Julie Koshy 2018 -2020Looking back on my education at Galgotias University, one word that comes to mind is exceptional. I found the classes and knowledge taught to be rewarding in every aspect, resulting in immediate success in my career upon graduation. The quality education one receives here through education-friendly environment, seminars, study tours, skill development programs etc helps in building up one's career in the best way possible. My journey during the course has completely moulded and shaped my personality and given me the confidence to impart what I know. The all-time support and motivation provided by the highly intellectual and experienced faculty members have enlightened me throughout this wonderful journey. Huge respect, love, and devotion to the entire faculty members and department. It's their efforts that make me count myself in a better profession. Swati Malik 2020-22I am happy that I chose the right University for my B.Ed. course. I got various opportunities to enhance my skills in curricular and co-curricular fields. I really found it the right place for a teacher trainee who aspires to achieve good academic background in teacher education both in practical and theoretical. I got the opportunity to study varied subjects and do so many activities which I had never done before. It was an awesome journey and special thanks to all my faculty members for their immense support, love and cooperation. I got to learn so much with this experience which I am implementing in my teaching and because of this experience and exposure, I received Star Teacher award in the first year of my teaching career. Virendra Panchal 2019-21Looking back on my Bachelor of education in the School of Education Galgotias University , one word that comes to mind is exceptional. I found the classes and knowledge taught to be rewarding in every aspect, resulting to immediate success in my career upon graduation. While at GU, I studied Bachelor of Education, I was always fascinated with and fell in love with while completing the degree on campus. One of the greatest things with the School of Education Department is the professors. They truly understand the merging of lectures and real-world examples to review while learning different topics in the Educational subject. The degree earned at GU will set you up with all the tools needed to have a successful career in any path you follow. I am proud to be a part of such a great institution and call myself a Galgotians.
